"[3] CZP1 NB CLOSURE AT CIMA IN PLACE // TRFC BEING DIVERTED"
"[13] C106-031 BOTH VEHS MOVED TO THE RHS [Shared]"
"[7] [Appended, 19:19:03] [1] WHI TOYT TUN VS GRY SDN "
"[3] GRY NISS SEN VS WHI TOYT TUN "
"[9] ^1039 BENITO C. (RE)--HE CPZ LINE 7 AND ADVS THAT THE INSPECTORS ARE TAKING A REPORT ON IT [Shared]"

"[5] [Appended, 23:24:27] [1] GRY BMW CP - BMW RESPONSE REQ WELFARE CHECK, HAD RECEIVED A CRASH NOTIFICATION, WHEN TALKING TO INV'D, HE STATED "NO, NO, NO, I DON'T NEED ANY ASSISTANCE." BMW REC'D ANOTHER NOTIFICATION FOR THE VEH AT SAME 1020 "SOS SIGNAL" W/ NO VC. ADV'D RP LINE 2"
"[2] 87-CZP1 TC NOT W/IN THE CLSR , START 9C"
"[1] SOUNDS LIKE A SIGNBOARD GOT HIT"

"[1] ^CT ADVS SIGNALS ON FLASH DUE TO CONST TIL 0500"

Log.Location: "La Jolla Village Dr W Onr / I5 S"

details.IncidentDetail: "[53] ADD LINE 23// NEAR BEND- RP ADV VEH WAS APPROX 200 FT IFO RP - RP HONKED AND VEH WENT BACK INTO THEIR LANES AND TURNED ON HAZARDS- INQ IF RP WAS IN NEAR TC- ADV "DID NOT HAVE TO HIT BRAKES""
"[52] CORR LINE 51// LATE ENTRY PER MONO1- NEAR HEAD ON TC"
"[31] VEH HAD SQUARE CARGO BOX ON TOP OF VEH "
"[23] VEH WAS DRIVING 1/2 OVER IN SB LANES AND WENT BACK INTO THEIR LANES AND TURNED ON HAZARDS"
"[21] RP HEADED SB- VEH HEADED NB IN SB LANES- RP SAW HEADLIGHTS GOING BACK AND FOURTH "
"[8] OLDER VEH BASED ON HEADED LIGHTS- DIM "
"[2] VEH HEADED NB IN SB LANES "

Log.Location: "I10 E / Cherry Valley Blvd Exit 90 Mm 3"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] 97-R25 BRINGING IN BREAK FROM CHERRY VALLEY"
